raw.message: Parie sur le meilleur du foot européen avec Betclic ! 🏆⚽️

hook.summary: Dynamic motion graphics featuring football team logos and a 100€ betting offer.
hook.visual_action: Logos of major football clubs fly across a neon-lit stadium background while promotional text scales up in the center.

scene_flow: Logos of top European football clubs fly into the frame over a stylized stadium background.
The main offer of up to 100€ in free bets is revealed prominently in the center.
The call to action 'PARIE SUR L'EUROPE' appears with a 'Jen profite' button.
The animation loops with subtle movement of the background elements and team logos.
audience_proxy: French-speaking football enthusiasts interested in sports betting and European leagues.
